rows.label: tev057601_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev057601_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Jitsu about Nightglow Forest's name.

rows.label: tev057601_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev057601_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Jitsu about recent developments.

rows.label: tev057601_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Jitsu about Nightglow Forest.

rows.label: tev057601_SEL0051
rows.name: Ask Jitsu about indigens.

rows.label: tev057601_SEL2021
rows.name: Ask Jitsu about recent developments.

rows.label: tev057601_MSG0001
rows.name:
Human BLADEs giving names to
places in Yorupikka Woods.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057601_MSG0002
rows.name:
Up until now, Nopon just used
whatever name came to mind. Very
hard for Jitsu to keep track![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057601_MSG0003
rows.name:
Jitsu and friends are going to
start using new human names so
business transactions go smoother.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057601_MSG0004
rows.name:
By the way, random friend said that some
Nightglow Forest names have rather dramatic
flair. Jitsu have no idea what this mean.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057601_MSG0008
rows.name:
Dadapon gone and Tatsu went
to live with new friends...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057601_MSG0009
rows.name:
That means Jitsu going to succeed
Mamapon as next Dodonga Caravan leader![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057601_MSG0010
rows.name:
Probably for the best. Jitsu have way
better math and people skills than Tatsu.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057601_MSG0016
rows.name:
*sniff* Jitsu put everyone in danger.
Even Mamapon and little brotherpons...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057601_MSG0017
rows.name: Maybe Jitsu not ready to be next leader.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057601_MSG0018
rows.name:
Come home, Tatsu! No matter what anyone
says, Dodonga Caravan miss Tatsu![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057601_MSG0025
rows.name:
Deep in heart of Nightglow Forest is
special place friend cannot reach on foot.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057601_MSG0026
rows.name:
But friend could get there if
friend grew wings... And friend
can do THAT! Jitsu believes![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057601_MSG0027
rows.name:
Jitsu and other Nopon friends can also
fly, but it hard work, so no one do it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057601_MSG0028
rows.name:
Instead, Nopon use secret passageway
that only Nopon can fit through.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057601_MSG0029
rows.name:
Then they arrive at
lovely beautiful place![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057601_MSG0035
rows.name:
Stinky Bias that tried to eat
brotherpon Tatsu are gone, but
friend should still not let guard down.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057601_MSG0036
rows.name:
Plenty of dangerous critters on Mira with
bigger mouths and appetites than Bias![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057601_MSG0037
rows.name:
Brotherpon taking big risk getting used to
urban life. Pack on too many pounds, and Tatsu
become walking lunchbox for hungry critters![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057601_MSG0038
rows.name:
...Wait. If Tatsu come home, maybe
Jitsu can use fat brotherpon as
decoy to catch huge caecus![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057601_MSG0039
rows.name:
Then Jitsu can eat meat again! Meat meat
MEEEEAT! ...How long has it been?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057601_MSG0040
rows.name:
Mo? Where did Dadapo...er...where
did BROTHERPON Tatsu go?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057601_MSG0041
rows.name:
What is Jitsu supposed to
do without brotherpon?![ST:wait ]
